controls.control_objective: To ensure be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall be called the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial
Companies - Miscellaneous) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be called the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - miscellaneous) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
These Directions shall come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of
the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to come into effect on the day they are placed on the website of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc')
controls.control_description:
The applicability of these Directions is as follows
(1) These Directions shall be applicable to the following Non-Banking Financial
Companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'NBFCs' and individually as 'an
NBFC'), subject to layer-wise applicability, unless stated otherwise:
Note: The applicability under these Directions is in line with the regulatory structure for
NBFCs as set out in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies -
Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to the following non-banking financial companies (hereinafter collectively referred to as 'nbfcs' and individually as 'an nbfc')

controls.control_objective: To ensure be required to comply with the provisions of chapter ii and nbfcs in the middle layer (nbfc-ml) or above layers shall comply with chapters ii and iii
controls.control_description:
(i) NBFCs classified under the Base Layer (NBFC-BL) shall be required to comply
with the provisions of Chapter II and NBFCs in the Middle Layer (NBFC-ML)
or above layers shall comply with Chapters II and III, unless stated otherwise.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be required to comply with the provisions of chapter ii and nbfcs in the middle layer (nbfc-ml) or above layers shall comply with chapters ii and iii

controls.control_objective: To ensure apply to the following
controls.control_description:
(ii) The provisions given in Chapter II and III shall apply to the following, subject
to layer-wise applicability, unless specified otherwise:
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to apply to the following

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to hfc registered with the rbi under the provisions of the nhb act, 1987
controls.control_description:
(iii) The provisions contained in paragraphs 6 to 22 and paragraphs 24 to 27, shall
be applicable to HFC registered with the RBI under the provisions of the NHB
Act, 1987.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to hfc registered with the rbi under the provisions of the nhb act, 1987

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to mgc registered with rbi under the scheme of registration of mortgage guarantee companies
controls.control_description:
(iv) The provisions contained in paragraphs 6, 7, 14, 15, 25 and 26 shall be
applicable to MGC registered with RBI under the scheme of Registration of
Mortgage Guarantee Companies.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to mgc registered with rbi under the scheme of registration of mortgage guarantee companies

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to spd registered with the rbi as nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(v) The provisions contained in paragraphs 6, 7, 8, 14, 15, 25 and 26 shall be
applicable to SPD registered with the RBI as NBFC under the provisions of the
RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to spd registered with the rbi as nbfc under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-p2p registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(vi) The provisions contained in paragraphs 6, 7, 14, 15, 25 and 26 shall be
applicable to NBFC-P2P registered with the RBI under the provisions of the
RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-p2p registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable for nbfc-aa registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(vii) The provisions contained in paragraph 6, 7, 25 and 26 shall be applicable for
NBFC-AA registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable for nbfc-aa registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to cic registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(viii) The provisions contained in paragraphs 6, 7, 9 to 20, and 25 to 27, shall be
applicable to CIC registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act,
1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to cic registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to nbfc-factor registered with the rbi under the provisions of the factoring regulation act, 2011 and nbfc-icc registered with the rbi u
controls.control_description:
(ix) The provisions contained in Chapter IV shall be applicable to NBFC-Factor
registered with the RBI under the provisions of the Factoring Regulation Act,
2011 and NBFC-ICC registered with the RBI under the provisions of the
Factoring Regulation Act, 2011.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to nbfc-factor registered with the rbi under the provisions of the factoring regulation act, 2011 and nbfc-icc registered with the rbi u

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable to idf-nbfc registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934
controls.control_description:
(x) The provisions contained in Chapter V shall be applicable to IDF-NBFC
registered with the RBI under the provisions of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable to idf-nbfc registered with the rbi under the provisions of the rbi act, 1934

controls.control_objective: To ensure bear the meanings assigned to them and as defined in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions and framewo
controls.control_description:
In this Chapter, unless the context otherwise requires, the terms herein shall bear the
meanings assigned to them and as defined in the Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Registration, Exemptions and Framework for Scale Based
Regulation) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to bear the meanings assigned to them and as defined in the reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - registration, exemptions and framewo

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them under the said acts
controls.control_description:
The words or expressions used in these Directions but not defined herein and defined
in the Reserve Bank of India Act, 1934 (Act 2 of 1934), or the Banking Regulation Act,
1949 (Act 10 of 1949) shall have the same meaning as assigned to them under the said
Acts.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them under the said acts

controls.control_objective: To ensure have the same meaning as assigned to them in the companies act, 1956 or companies act, 2013
controls.control_description:
Any other words or expressions not defined in the said Acts shall have the same
meaning as assigned to them in the Companies Act, 1956 or Companies Act, 2013.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have the same meaning as assigned to them in the companies act, 1956 or companies act, 2013

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate, not later than one month from the occurrence of any change in the complete postal address, telephone number/s and fax number/s of the reg
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall communicate, not later than one month from the occurrence of any
change in the complete postal address, telephone number/s and fax number/s of the
registered/ corporate office to the Regional Office of the Department of Supervision of the
Reserve Bank under whose jurisdiction it is registered and to the Department of
Regulation, Central Office, Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate, not later than one month from the occurrence of any change in the complete postal address, telephone number/s and fax number/s of the reg

controls.control_objective: To ensure communicate, not later than one month from the occurrence of any change in: (1) the names and residential addresses of the directors of the company
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to communicate, not later than one month from the occurrence of any change in: (1) the names and residential addresses of the directors of the company

controls.control_objective: To ensure adhere to the instructions contained in circular titled 'guidelines for appointment of statutory central auditors (scas)/ statutory auditors (sas) of
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall adhere to the instructions contained in circular titled 'Guidelines for
Appointment of Statutory Central Auditors (SCAs)/ Statutory Auditors (SAs) of
Commercial Banks (excluding RRBs), UCBs and NBFCs (including HFCs)' dated April
27, 2021, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to adhere to the instructions contained in circular titled 'guidelines for appointment of statutory central auditors (scas)/ statutory auditors (sas) of

controls.control_objective: To ensure follow the guidelines on private placement of non-convertible debentures (ncds) given as under
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall follow the guidelines on private placement of Non-Convertible Debentures
(NCDs) given as under.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to follow the guidelines on private placement of non-convertible debentures (ncds) given as under

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable wherever not contradictory
controls.control_description:
The provisions of Companies Act, 2013 and Rules framed
thereunder shall be applicable wherever not contradictory.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable wherever not contradictory

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board approved policy for resource planning which, inter- alia, shall cover the planning horizon and the periodicity of private placeme
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall put in place a Board approved policy for resource planning which, inter-
alia, shall cover the planning horizon and the periodicity of private placement.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board approved policy for resource planning which, inter- alia, shall cover the planning horizon and the periodicity of private placeme

controls.control_objective: To ensure be governed by the following instructions: (1) the minimum subscription per investor shall be ₹20,000 (rupees twenty thousand)
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be governed by the following instructions: (1) the minimum subscription per investor shall be ₹20,000 (rupees twenty thousand)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in two separate categories, those with a maximum subscription of less than ₹1 crore and those with a minimum subscription of ₹1 crore and above per
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in two separate categories, those with a maximum subscription of less than ₹1 crore and those with a minimum subscription of ₹1 crore and above per

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a limit of 200 subscribers for every financial year, for issuance of ncds with a maximum subscription of less than ₹1 crore, and such subscription
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be a limit of 200 subscribers for every financial year, for issuance of ncds with a maximum subscription of less than ₹1 crore, and such subscription

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no limit on the number of subscribers in respect of issuances with a minimum subscription of ₹1 crore and above
controls.control_description:
(4) There shall be no limit on the number of subscribers in respect of issuances with a
minimum subscription of ₹1 crore and above;
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be no limit on the number of subscribers in respect of issuances with a minimum subscription of ₹1 crore and above

controls.control_objective: To ensure be with the issuers
controls.control_description:
the option to create security in favour
of subscribers shall be with the issuers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be with the issuers

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as public deposits as defined in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acceptance of public deposits) directions, 2025
controls.control_description:
Such unsecured debentures shall not be
treated as public deposits as defined in Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking
Financial Companies - Acceptance of Public Deposits) Directions, 2025.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as public deposits as defined in reserve bank of india (non-banking financial companies - acceptance of public deposits) directions, 2025

controls.control_objective: To ensure issue debentures only for deployment of funds on its own balance sheet and not to facilitate resource requests of group entities/parent company/ assoc
controls.control_description:
(5) An NBFC shall issue debentures only for deployment of funds on its own balance
sheet and not to facilitate resource requests of group entities/parent company/
associates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to issue debentures only for deployment of funds on its own balance sheet and not to facilitate resource requests of group entities/parent company/ assoc

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend loans against the security of its own debentures (issued either by way of private placement or public issue)
controls.control_description:
(6) An NBFC shall not extend loans against the security of its own debentures (issued
either by way of private placement or public issue).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend loans against the security of its own debentures (issued either by way of private placement or public issue)

controls.control_objective: To ensure be applicable
controls.control_description:
For NCDs of maturity upto one year, instructions contained in 'Master Direction -
Reserve Bank of India (Commercial Paper and Non-Convertible Debentures of original
or initial maturity upto one year) Directions, 2024' dated January 03, 2024 (as amended
from time to time), issued by Financial Markets Regulation Department of the Reserve
Bank, shall be applicable.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be applicable

controls.control_objective: To ensure have a board approved policy for resource planning which, inter alia, covers the planning horizon and the periodicity of the private placement
controls.control_description:
<image>
(NUCFDC) may make offer or invitation to subscribe to its equity shares on a private
placement basis to more than 200 persons in aggregate in a financial year, subject to the
conditions specified herein below:
(1) NUCFDC shall have a Board approved policy for resource planning which, inter
alia, covers the planning horizon and the periodicity of the private placement.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to have a board approved policy for resource planning which, inter alia, covers the planning horizon and the periodicity of the private placement

controls.control_objective: To ensure only be made to ucbs and national co-operative development corporation (ncdc)
controls.control_description:
(2) Offer/invitation for the private placement of equity shares under these guidelines
shall only be made to UCBs and National Co-operative Development Corporation
(NCDC).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to only be made to ucbs and national co-operative development corporation (ncdc)

controls.control_objective: To ensure clearly state that ucbs must ensure compliance with all the applicable statutory requirements, as well as the extant instructions/directions issued by
controls.control_description:
(3) The offer document shall clearly state that UCBs must ensure compliance with all
the applicable statutory requirements, as well as the extant instructions/directions
issued by Reserve Bank when making an application for subscribing to the equity
shares under the offer.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to clearly state that ucbs must ensure compliance with all the applicable statutory requirements, as well as the extant instructions/directions issued by

controls.control_objective: To ensure extend any loan or advance or any other kind of financial accommodation against the security of its own shares
controls.control_description:
(4) NUCFDC shall not extend any loan or advance or any other kind of financial
accommodation against the security of its own shares.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to extend any loan or advance or any other kind of financial accommodation against the security of its own shares

controls.control_objective: To ensure be used for the purposes consistent with the mandate of nucfdc as approved by reserve bank
controls.control_description:
(5) Proceeds of the share capital raised under these guidelines shall be used for the
purposes consistent with the mandate of NUCFDC as approved by Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be used for the purposes consistent with the mandate of nucfdc as approved by reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with all the applicable statutory and regulatory requirements with regard to the private placement of securities
controls.control_description:
(6) Subject to the provisions of these Directions, NUCFDC shall ensure compliance
with all the applicable statutory and regulatory requirements with regard to the
private placement of securities.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with all the applicable statutory and regulatory requirements with regard to the private placement of securities

controls.control_objective: To ensure submit a quarterly statement containing, inter alia, the amount of equity raised, the number and category of subscribers and the subscription amounts
controls.control_description:
(7) NUCFDC shall submit a quarterly statement containing, inter alia, the amount of
equity raised, the number and category of subscribers and the subscription
amounts (during the quarter as well as cumulatively) to the Department of
Regulation, Reserve Bank of India, Central Office within 15 days from the close of
a quarter.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to submit a quarterly statement containing, inter alia, the amount of equity raised, the number and category of subscribers and the subscription amounts

controls.control_objective: To ensure remain in force from the date of issue till march 31, 2029
controls.control_description:
The Directions contained in paragraph 13A shall remain in force from the date of
issue till March 31, 2029, unless modified or withdrawn earlier or extended further by the
Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to remain in force from the date of issue till march 31, 2029

controls.control_objective: To ensure contribute to the capital of a partnership firm or become a partner of such firm
controls.control_description:
No NBFC shall contribute to the capital of a partnership firm or become a partner of
such firm.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to contribute to the capital of a partnership firm or become a partner of such firm

controls.control_objective: To ensure also include limited liability partnerships (llps)
controls.control_description: Partnership firms shall also include Limited Liability Partnerships (LLPs).
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also include limited liability partnerships (llps)

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be applicable in respect of association of persons, these being similar in nature to partnership firms
controls.control_description:
The aforesaid prohibition shall also be applicable in respect of Association of persons,
these being similar in nature to partnership firms.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to also be applicable in respect of association of persons, these being similar in nature to partnership firms

controls.control_objective: To ensure seek early retirement from the partnership firm / llp / association of persons
controls.control_description:
An NBFC which had already contributed to the capital of a partnership firm /LLP /
Association of persons or is a partner of a partnership firm / LLP or member of an
Association of persons shall seek early retirement from the partnership firm / LLP /
Association of persons.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to seek early retirement from the partnership firm / llp / association of persons

controls.control_objective: To ensure furnish information about downgrading / upgrading of assigned rating of any financial product issued by them, within fifteen days of such a change in
controls.control_description:
NBFCs with asset size of ₹100 crore and above shall furnish information about
downgrading / upgrading of assigned rating of any financial product issued by them,
within fifteen days of such a change in rating, to the Regional Office of the Reserve Bank
under whose jurisdiction their registered office is functioning.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to furnish information about downgrading / upgrading of assigned rating of any financial product issued by them, within fifteen days of such a change in

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as financial assets and receipt of interest income on fixed deposits with banks shall not be treated as income from financial assets as the
controls.control_description:
Investments in fixed deposits shall not be treated as financial assets and receipt of
interest income on fixed deposits with banks shall not be treated as income from financial
assets as these are not covered under the activities mentioned in the definition of
"financial Institution" in section 45-I(c) of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as financial assets and receipt of interest income on fixed deposits with banks shall not be treated as income from financial assets as the

controls.control_objective: To ensure take proactive steps for increasing the use of electronic payment systems, elimination of post-dated cheques and gradual phase-out of cheques in their
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall take proactive steps for increasing the use of electronic payment
systems, elimination of post-dated cheques and gradual phase-out of cheques in their
day-to-day business transactions which would result in more cost-effective transactions
and faster and accurate settlements.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take proactive steps for increasing the use of electronic payment systems, elimination of post-dated cheques and gradual phase-out of cheques in their

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no need for nbfcs to take additional cheques
controls.control_description:
Considering the protection available under section 25 of the Payment and Settlement
Systems Act, 2007 which accords the same rights and remedies to the payee
(beneficiary) against dishonour of electronic funds transfer instructions on grounds of
insufficiency of funds as are available under section 138 of the Negotiable Instruments
Act, 1881, there shall be no need for NBFCs to take additional cheques, if any, from
customers in addition to NACH (Debit) mandates.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no need for nbfcs to take additional cheques

controls.control_objective: To ensure be obtained in locations
controls.control_description:
Cheques
complying with CTS-2010 standard formats alone shall be obtained in locations, where
the facility of NACH is not available.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be obtained in locations

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure compliance with the requirements under sections 269ss and 269t of the income tax act, 1961, as amended from time to time
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall ensure compliance with the requirements under sections 269SS and
269T of the Income Tax Act, 1961, as amended from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure compliance with the requirements under sections 269ss and 269t of the income tax act, 1961, as amended from time to time

controls.control_objective: To ensure , however, continue to carry out customer due diligence processes in line with regulations governing standards for know your customer (kyc) prescribed
controls.control_description:
NBFCs, may, however, continue to carry out customer due diligence processes in line
with regulations governing standards for Know Your Customer (KYC) prescribed in
Reserve Bank of India (Non-Banking Financial Companies - Know Your Customer)
Directions, 2025, Anti-Money Laundering (AML), Combating of Financing of Terrorism
(CFT) and obligations of regulated entities under Prevention of Money Laundering Act,
(PMLA), 2002 in addition to ensuring compliance with relevant provisions under Foreign
Exchange Management Act (FEMA) for overseas remittances.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to , however, continue to carry out customer due diligence processes in line with regulations governing standards for know your customer (kyc) prescribed

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rounded off to the nearest rupee, i
controls.control_description:
All transactions of the NBFC, including payment of interest on deposits/ charging of
interest on advances, shall be rounded off to the nearest rupee, i.e., fractions of 50 paise
and above shall be rounded off to the next higher rupee and fractions of less than 50
paise shall be ignored.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rounded off to the nearest rupee, i

controls.control_objective: To ensure be rejected by them
controls.control_description:
It shall be ensured that cheques/drafts issued by clients containing
fractions of a rupee shall not be rejected by them.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be rejected by them

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as part of the financial business carried out by nbfcs
controls.control_description:
Providing safe deposit locker facility is a fee-based service and shall not be reckoned
as part of the financial business carried out by NBFCs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as part of the financial business carried out by nbfcs

controls.control_objective: To ensure disclose to their customers that the activity is not regulated by the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
NBFCs offering safe deposit locker
facility or intending to offer it, shall disclose to their customers that the activity is not
regulated by the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to disclose to their customers that the activity is not regulated by the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure take notice of the above facts in order to exercise due caution while handling such cases
controls.control_description:
NBFCs shall take notice of the above facts in order to exercise due caution while
handling such cases.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to take notice of the above facts in order to exercise due caution while handling such cases

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible for authorized dealer- category ii (ad cat ii) license
controls.control_description:
In order to increase the accessibility and efficiency of forex services extended to the
members of the public for their day-to-day non-trade current account transactions, non-
deposit taking NBFC-ICC shall be eligible for Authorized Dealer- Category II (AD Cat II)
license, subject to meeting the following conditions:
(1) an NBFC offering such services shall have a 'minimum investment grade rating'.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible for authorized dealer- category ii (ad cat ii) license

controls.control_objective: To ensure put in place a board approved policy on:
controls.control_description: (2) an NBFC offering such services shall put in place a board approved policy on:
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to put in place a board approved policy on:

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place for such services
controls.control_description:
A monitoring mechanism, at least at monthly intervals, shall be put in place for such
services.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place for such services

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the reserve bank, foreign exchange department, central office, mumbai for the ad-cat ii licence
controls.control_description:
The eligible NBFC desirous of undertaking AD-Cat II activities shall approach the
Reserve Bank, Foreign Exchange Department, Central Office, Mumbai for the AD-Cat II
licence.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the reserve bank, foreign exchange department, central office, mumbai for the ad-cat ii licence

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application to the reserve bank for grant of cor as nbfc-factor under section 3 of the factoring regulation act, 2011 and shall ensure to comp
controls.control_description:
Every company intending to undertake factoring business shall make an application
to the Reserve Bank for grant of CoR as NBFC-Factor under section 3 of the Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011 and shall ensure to comply with the principal business as mentioned
in paragraph 42 of these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application to the reserve bank for grant of cor as nbfc-factor under section 3 of the factoring regulation act, 2011 and shall ensure to comp

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application to the reserve bank for grant of cor under the factoring regulation act, 2011
controls.control_description:
Any existing NBFC-ICC intending to undertake factoring business, shall make an
application to the Reserve Bank for grant of CoR under the Factoring Regulation Act,
2011, if it satisfies the following eligibility criteria:
(1) Not accepting or holding public deposits;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application to the reserve bank for grant of cor under the factoring regulation act, 2011

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach the reserve bank for conversion from nbfc-icc to nbfc-factor
controls.control_description:
Any existing NBFC-ICC which does not satisfy the above conditions but intends to
undertake factoring business, shall approach the Reserve Bank for conversion from
NBFC-ICC to NBFC-Factor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach the reserve bank for conversion from nbfc-icc to nbfc-factor

controls.control_objective: To ensure comply with the principal business as specified in paragraph 42 of these directions
controls.control_description:
Such NBFC-ICCs shall comply with the principal business
as specified in paragraph 42 of these directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to comply with the principal business as specified in paragraph 42 of these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be submitted, through pravaah portal, with all supporting documents meant for new registration as nbfc-factor, together with surrender of original cor
controls.control_description:
Application for conversion described at paragraph 38 above shall be submitted,
through PRAVAAH portal, with all supporting documents meant for new registration as
NBFC-Factor, together with surrender of original CoR issued by the Reserve Bank to the
NBFC-ICC under section 45-IA of the RBI Act, 1934.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be submitted, through pravaah portal, with all supporting documents meant for new registration as nbfc-factor, together with surrender of original cor

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct the business of factoring
controls.control_description:
An entity not registered with the Reserve Bank under the Factoring Regulation Act,
2011 may conduct the business of factoring, if it is an entity mentioned in section 5 of the
Factoring Regulation Act, 2011, i.e., a bank or a body corporate established under an Act
of Parliament or State Legislature, or a Government Company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct the business of factoring

controls.control_objective: To ensure commence factoring business within six months from the date of grant of cor
controls.control_description:
NBFC-Factor or NBFC-ICC which has been granted CoR by the Reserve Bank under
the Factoring Regulation Act, 2011 shall commence factoring business within six months
from the date of grant of CoR.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to commence factoring business within six months from the date of grant of cor

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure that its financial assets in the factoring business constitute at least 50 per cent of its total assets and its income derived from factoring b
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-Factor shall ensure that its financial assets in the factoring business
constitute at least 50 per cent of its total assets and its income derived from factoring
business is not less than 50 per cent of its gross income.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to ensure that its financial assets in the factoring business constitute at least 50 per cent of its total assets and its income derived from factoring b

controls.control_objective: To ensure conduct the factoring business in accordance with the factoring regulation act, 2011 and the rules and regulations framed under it or the directions a
controls.control_description:
NBFC-Factors or NBFC-ICCs which have been granted CoR under the Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011 shall conduct the factoring business in accordance with the
Factoring Regulation Act, 2011 and the rules and regulations framed under it or the
directions and guidelines issued by the Reserve Bank from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to conduct the factoring business in accordance with the factoring regulation act, 2011 and the rules and regulations framed under it or the directions a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be treated as npa irrespective of when the receivable was acquired by the nbfc-factor or whether the factoring was carried out on "with recourse" basi
controls.control_description:
In addition to the Asset Classification norms contained in Reserve Bank of India (Non-
Banking Financial Companies - Income Recognition, Asset Classification and
Provisioning) Directions, 2025, for NBFC-Factors or an NBFC-ICC which have been
granted CoR under the Factoring Regulation Act, 2011, a receivable acquired under
factoring which has remained overdue for following mentioned period of due date as
applicable, shall be treated as NPA irrespective of when the receivable was acquired by
the NBFC-Factor or whether the factoring was carried out on "with recourse" basis or
"without-recourse" basis:
NPA Norms
NBFC-Factors with asset size of less than ₹500 crore more than 180 days
NBFC-Factors with asset of size of ₹500 crore and above or
more than 90 days
an NBFC-ICC which have been granted CoR under the
Factoring Regulation Act, 2011
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be treated as npa irrespective of when the receivable was acquired by the nbfc-factor or whether the factoring was carried out on "with recourse" basi

controls.control_objective: To ensure be shown as npa and provisioning made accordingly
controls.control_description:
The entity on which the exposure was booked shall be shown as NPA and
provisioning made accordingly.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be shown as npa and provisioning made accordingly

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned as under: (1) in case of factoring on "with-recourse" basis, the exposure shall be reckoned on the assignor
controls.control_description:
Exposure norms shall be reckoned as under:
(1) In case of factoring on "with-recourse" basis, the exposure shall be reckoned on the
assignor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned as under: (1) in case of factoring on "with-recourse" basis, the exposure shall be reckoned on the assignor

controls.control_objective: To ensure be reckoned on the debtor, irrespective of credit risk cover/protection provided
controls.control_description:
(2) In case of factoring on "without-recourse" basis, the exposure shall be reckoned on
the debtor, irrespective of credit risk cover/protection provided, except in cases of
international factoring where the entire credit risk has been assumed by the import
Factor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be reckoned on the debtor, irrespective of credit risk cover/protection provided

controls.control_objective: To ensure be put in place before factoring business is undertaken by an nbfc-factor or eligible nbfc-icc which has been granted cor under the factoring regulati
controls.control_description:
Proper and adequate control and reporting mechanism shall be put in place before
factoring business is undertaken by an NBFC-Factor or eligible NBFC-ICC which has
been granted CoR under the Factoring Regulation Act, 2011.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be put in place before factoring business is undertaken by an nbfc-factor or eligible nbfc-icc which has been granted cor under the factoring regulati

controls.control_objective: To ensure carry out a thorough credit appraisal of the debtors before entering into any factoring arrangement or prior to establishing lines of credit with the
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-Factor shall carry out a thorough credit appraisal of the debtors before
entering into any factoring arrangement or prior to establishing lines of credit with the
export Factor.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to carry out a thorough credit appraisal of the debtors before entering into any factoring arrangement or prior to establishing lines of credit with the

controls.control_objective: To ensure be extended in respect of invoices which represent genuine trade transactions
controls.control_description:
Factoring services shall be extended in respect of invoices which represent genuine
trade transactions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be extended in respect of invoices which represent genuine trade transactions

controls.control_objective: To ensure be a clearly laid down board-approved limit for all such underwriting commitments
controls.control_description:
Since under "without recourse" factoring transactions, the NBFC is underwriting the
credit risk on the debtor, there shall be a clearly laid down board-approved limit for all
such underwriting commitments.
controls.implementation_method: Implement technical controls to configure system to be a clearly laid down board-approved limit for all such underwriting commitments

controls.control_objective: To ensure share information about common borrowers
controls.control_description: NBFC-Factors and banks shall share information about common borrowers.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to share information about common borrowers

controls.control_objective: To ensure ensure to intimate the limits sanctioned to the borrower to the concerned banks / nbfcs and details of debts factored so as to avoid double financing
controls.control_description:
An
NBFC-Factor shall ensure to intimate the limits sanctioned to the borrower to the
concerned banks / NBFCs and details of debts factored so as to avoid double financing.
controls.implementation_method: Implement reporting procedure to ensure to intimate the limits sanctioned to the borrower to the concerned banks / nbfcs and details of debts factored so as to avoid double financing

controls.control_objective: To ensure make an application to fed for necessary authorization under fema,1999 to deal in foreign exchange and adhere to the terms and conditions prescribed b
controls.control_description:
An NBFC-Factor or NBFC-ICC which has been granted CoR under the Factoring
Regulation Act, 2011, intending to deal in foreign exchange through export/ import
factoring, shall make an application to FED for necessary authorization under FEMA,1999
to deal in foreign exchange and adhere to the terms and conditions prescribed by FED of
the Reserve Bank and all the relevant provisions of the FEMA or Rules, Regulations,
Notifications, Directions or Orders made thereunder from time to time.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to make an application to fed for necessary authorization under fema,1999 to deal in foreign exchange and adhere to the terms and conditions prescribed b

controls.control_objective: To ensure be set up either as a trust or as a company
controls.control_description: The IDF shall be set up either as a trust or as a company.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be set up either as a trust or as a company

controls.control_objective: To ensure be permitted to raise funds through issue of either rupee or dollar denominated bonds of minimum five-year maturity
controls.control_description:
An IDF-NBFC shall be permitted to raise funds through issue of either rupee or dollar
denominated bonds of minimum five-year maturity.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be permitted to raise funds through issue of either rupee or dollar denominated bonds of minimum five-year maturity

controls.control_objective: To ensure be subject to minimum tenor of five years and the ecb loans should not be sourced from foreign branches of indian banks
controls.control_description:
Provided that such borrowings shall be subject to minimum tenor of five years and the
ECB loans should not be sourced from foreign branches of Indian banks.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be subject to minimum tenor of five years and the ecb loans should not be sourced from foreign branches of indian banks

controls.control_objective: To ensure also be required to adhere to the guidelines issued by the foreign exchange department of the reserve bank
controls.control_description:
Regarding ECBs, an IDF-NBFC shall also be required to adhere to the guidelines
issued by the Foreign Exchange Department of the Reserve Bank.
controls.implementation_method: Establish and maintain policy to also be required to adhere to the guidelines issued by the foreign exchange department of the reserve bank

controls.control_objective: To ensure be eligible to sponsor (sponsorship as defined by sebi regulations for mutual funds) idf-mfs with prior approval of the reserve bank subject to the fo
controls.control_description:
An NBFC shall be eligible to sponsor (sponsorship as defined by SEBI Regulations
for Mutual Funds) IDF-MFs with prior approval of the Reserve Bank subject to the
following conditions (based on the audited financial statements), in addition to those
prescribed by SEBI:
(1) The NBFC shall have a minimum NOF of ₹300 crore and CRAR of 15 per cent;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be eligible to sponsor (sponsorship as defined by sebi regulations for mutual funds) idf-mfs with prior approval of the reserve bank subject to the fo

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than three per cent of the net advances
controls.control_description: (2) Its net NPAs shall be less than three per cent of the net advances;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than three per cent of the net advances

controls.control_objective: To ensure have been in existence for at least five years
controls.control_description: (3) It shall have been in existence for at least five years;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to have been in existence for at least five years

controls.control_objective: To ensure be earning profits for the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory
controls.control_description:
<image>
(4) It shall be earning profits for the last three years and its performance shall be
satisfactory;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be earning profits for the last three years and its performance shall be satisfactory

controls.control_objective: To ensure be less than the regulatory minimum prescribed for it
controls.control_description:
(5) The CRAR of the NBFC post investment in the IDF-MF shall not be less than the
regulatory minimum prescribed for it;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be less than the regulatory minimum prescribed for it

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to maintain the required level of nof after accounting for investment in the proposed idf-mf
controls.control_description:
(6) The NBFC shall continue to maintain the required level of NOF after accounting for
investment in the proposed IDF-MF;
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to maintain the required level of nof after accounting for investment in the proposed idf-mf

controls.control_objective: To ensure be no supervisory concerns with respect to the nbfc
controls.control_description: (7) There shall be no supervisory concerns with respect to the NBFC.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be no supervisory concerns with respect to the nbfc

controls.control_objective: To ensure approach, through pravaah portal, the department of regulation of the reserve bank, for prior approval to sponsor idf-mfs
controls.control_description:
An NBFC that fulfils the eligibility criteria as above shall approach, through PRAVAAH
portal, the Department of Regulation of the Reserve Bank, for prior approval to sponsor
IDF-MFs.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to approach, through pravaah portal, the department of regulation of the reserve bank, for prior approval to sponsor idf-mfs

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to remain repealed
controls.control_description:
The Directions, instructions, and guidelines repealed prior to
the issuance of these Directions shall continue to remain repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to remain repealed

controls.control_objective: To ensure continue to be governed by the provisions thereof
controls.control_description:
Notwithstanding such repeal, any action taken or purported to have been taken, or
initiated under the repealed Directions, instructions, or guidelines shall continue to be
governed by the provisions thereof.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to continue to be governed by the provisions thereof

controls.control_objective: To ensure be deemed as governed by these directions
controls.control_description:
All approvals or acknowledgments granted under
these repealed lists shall be deemed as governed by these Directions.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be deemed as governed by these directions

controls.control_objective: To ensure in any way prejudicially affect: a
controls.control_description:
Further, the repeal
of these directions, instructions, or guidelines shall not in any way prejudicially affect:
a.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to in any way prejudicially affect: a

controls.control_objective: To ensure be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline
controls.control_description:
and any such
investigation, legal proceedings or remedy may be instituted, continued, or enforced and
any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions,
instructions, or guidelines had not been repealed.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be instituted, continued, or enforced and any such penalty, forfeiture or punishment may be imposed as if those directions, instructions, or guideline

controls.control_objective: To ensure be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force
controls.control_description:
The provisions of these Directions shall be in addition to, and not in derogation of the
provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be in addition to, and not in derogation of the provisions of any other laws, rules, regulations, or directions, for the time being in force

controls.control_objective: To ensure be final and binding
controls.control_description:
For the purpose of giving effect to the provisions of these Directions or in order to
remove any difficulties in the application or interpretation of the provisions of these
Directions, the RBI may, if it considers necessary, issue necessary clarifications in respect
of any matter covered herein and the interpretation of any provision of these Directions
given by the RBI shall be final and binding.
controls.implementation_method: Implement operational procedure to be final and binding
